task: Using only the provided embedded packet (no external data or measurements), produce a launch-quality deliverable that selects a small, interpretable descriptor set under multicollinearity and recommends next experiments. Required outputs: (1) catalyst_descriptor_selection.ipynb implementing calculations, validation checks, record-level citations, auditable evidence table, sensitivity analyses, and formulas/executable logic; (2) experiment_plan.md describing prioritized next experiments, budgeted cost estimates (using decision_budget_usd), stopping criteria, and how new data would change recommendations. Apply the rule: treat any record with missing provenance, confidence < 0.70, or contradictory status as needs_review even if numeric metrics would otherwise permit selection. Do not use external measurements, proprietary/licensed software, or hidden assumptions. Cite governing values from the packet (limits, sensitivity_shift_pct, hard_threshold_record_count) and list unresolved assumptions. Provide a final recommendation table suitable for expert review, and highlight any records or choices flagged needs_review.
